title: UniversalGraves-Geyser
description: A Fabric mod that adds Bedrock Edition (Geyser/Floodgate) compatibility to Universal Graves.
body:
**What does it do?**
Universal Graves uses Polymer to render virtual blocks and display entity based graves. Java players see a nice custom grave. Bedrock players joining through Geyser often see nothing at all or just interact with an invisible block.

This server side addon translates Universal Graves into something Bedrock understands. It only affects Bedrock players. Java players still see the original grave.

For Bedrock players near a grave, the mod
1. Renders a skeleton skull block at the grave position
1. Spawns an invisible armor stand to show grave text
1. Spawns an invisible fox holding the first grave item as a visual hint
1. When a Bedrock player opens the grave user interface, the mod swaps Polymer player head buttons for simple vanilla icons so the menu makes sense.

**Requirements**
- Minecraft Java 1.21.10 (Tested)
- Fabric Loader plus Fabric API
- Universal Graves
- Geyser
- Floodgate recommended for detection

Drop the jar in your server mods folder, restart, and Bedrock players should finally see where they died.
